chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-199 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 565/23 2.For hearing of main case 27-05-2024 None present for the petitioners. ***** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far; same the position on the preceding date of hearing i.e. 22.09.2023. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
